objective: Strategie de Breakout sur 0GUSDC 4h. Indicateurs : ADX, EMA(20), ATR. Entree long quand ADX > 30 (tendance forte) et prix casse au-dessus de EMA(20). Stop-loss = 1.5x ATR, take-profit = 3.0x ATR.

iterations.hypothesis: Using a strong trend and price breaking above the EMA to enter long positions for potential breakout
